scripts.dev:win: concurrently "cross-env PYTHONPATH=. py -m uvicorn src.app.api.backtesting_api:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8001" "cross-env PYTHONPATH=. py -m uvicorn src.app.api.screener_api:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8002" "next dev"
scripts.dev:lin: concurrently "cross-env PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m uvicorn src.app.api.backtesting_api:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8001" "cross-env PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m uvicorn src.app.api.screener_api:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8002" "next dev --hostname 0.0.0.0 --port 3000"
scripts.start:win: concurrently "cross-env PYTHONPATH=. py -m uvicorn src.app.api.backtesting_api:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8001" "cross-env PYTHONPATH=. py -m uvicorn src.app.api.screener_api:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8002" "next start"
scripts.start:lin: concurrently "cross-env PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m uvicorn src.app.api.backtesting_api:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8001" "cross-env PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m uvicorn src.app.api.screener_api:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8002" "next start
